name: DoIP_SetBroadcastIPaddress
title: DoIP_SetBroadcastIPaddress
description: Sets target IP address for broadcast messages sent from this node.

parameters.name: broadcastAddress
parameters.description: 255.255.255.255: send a limited broadcast (default if IPv4 is active) "" (empty string): send a directed broadcast, deriving address from local IPv4 address other: if this is a valid string representation of an IP address, send to this address, e.g. a broadcast directed to a different network, or an IPv6 multicast address

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
